family_description: Bullpen Stress x Own-Starter Short-Outing Risk — interaction hypothesis family
provenance_note: Repo artifacts for H01, H02, H03, H03A-D, and orchestration files were unavailable at time of closeout. This registry was reconstructed from verified user-confirmed branch summaries provided in the closeout prompt. Provisional pending future repo artifact recovery.
family_disposition: CLOSE AS ACTIVE EDGE-SEARCH FAMILY; PRESERVE AS FUTURE LAYER / CONTEXT CANDIDATE

h02_verdict.interpretation: Too broad / diluted; discovery non-triviality gate failed

h03_verdict.interpretation: First clean staged pass; real interaction signal

h03a_verdict.interpretation: Market prices much of the mechanism already; incremental residual modest and inconsistent

h03b_verdict.interpretation: Interaction is genuine driver; not a fake conjunction or single-component artifact

h03c_verdict.interpretation: No single broad market-total environment reliably concentrates the residual edge

h03d_verdict.interpretation: >9.5 closing-total neighborhood suggestive but below evidence standard / underpowered

final_family_conclusion: H03 is a real structural interaction mechanism but not a confirmed standalone current-system edge. The interaction is genuine and not reducible to one component. Economic reality testing suggests the market prices most of the effect already. Broad total-bucket segmentation did not isolate a stable residual pocket. A >9.5 closing-total pocket appeared suggestive but remained below evidence standard. Preserve as future layer / context candidate only.
allowed_future_use: Context modifier in a multi-layer model
Conditioning variable for a future primary edge signal
Re-evaluation if >9.5 closing-total pocket gains sufficient sample size
Re-evaluation if market structure changes reduce pricing efficiency for this mechanism
disallowed_current_use: Weakening standards to rescue the family
Claiming economic exploitability from current results
carry_forward_note: H03 (bullpen stress × own-starter short-outing risk) is a real interaction mechanism but not a confirmed standalone edge. Economic reality testing suggests the market prices most of the effect already. Broad total-bucket segmentation did not isolate a stable residual pocket. A high-total (>9.5 closing total) pocket appeared suggestive but remained below evidence standard. Preserve H03 as a future layer / context modifier candidate rather than an active edge family.
next_research_direction: Move active research attention to new MLB hypothesis families more likely to produce currently usable edge. H03 is no longer an active candidate for research resources.
final_closeout_verdict: PROVISIONAL CLOSE AS ACTIVE EDGE FAMILY
